title: 31C CRM Address Book Entity
description: Canonical entity record at crm/address-book/{slug}.md. Single source of truth for biographical facts (name, emails, employer, LinkedIn, region). Single-writer per entity per canonical_owner policy.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Never changes for the lifetime of the entity.

name.description: Canonical full display name (English form per reference_bilingual_names memory).

aliases.description: Other spellings or name variants used by execs / external systems.

canonical_email.description: Primary email. Empty string allowed when unknown.

other_emails.description: Additional known email addresses. Used by auto-log entity resolver.

employer_aliases.description: Other spellings of the employer used in pipeline.md or external sources.

timezone.description: IANA timezone where the entity lives (e.g. Asia/Singapore).

operating_timezone.description: Optional. IANA timezone of working hours if different from `timezone`.

canonical_owner.description: Slug of the executive who maintains this entity record. Per type-tier policy (commercial -> alex-rivera, investor/tribe -> misha-hanin, etc.).

created.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when this entity was first created.

last_updated.description: ISO date of most recent edit to this entity record.
